title: Rink Drink Stainless Steel Champagne Ice Bucket - 35cm Hammered - 1x Home Pub Garden Table Wine Champagne Water Beer Bottle Drinks Cooler
features: Durable Stainless Steel Construction: Elevate your celebrations with this high-quality stainless steel champagne ice bucket from Rink Drink. Built for long-lasting use, it’s the perfect choice for weddings, parties, and various special occasions.

Mess-Free & Secure Design: With its oversized bowl and sturdy construction, this ice bucket ensures your bottles stay upright and secure while providing ample room for ice, preventing spills and keeping your drinks perfectly chilled.

Perfect for Any Event: Whether you're hosting a wedding, anniversary, or casual get-together, this bucket brings elegance and function, making it an ideal addition to any celebration. Use it to chill champagne, wine, or even bottled beers and soft drinks.

Flexible Use for Various Occasions: Designed to hold multiple bottles comfortably, this champagne bucket is perfect for large gatherings, making it an essential for every host looking to provide an elegant yet practical solution for chilling beverages.

Generous Dimensions: Measuring 35cm in diameter and 22.5cm in height, this large ice bucket offers ample space for multiple bottles and plenty of ice, ensuring your drinks stay cool all night while adding a sophisticated touch to your event.
description: Product Description At Rink Drink, we stock a wide variety of Bar and Cocktail Accessories, designed to aid and enhance your mixological experience and help ensure the satisfaction of you and your guests from the first sip to the last. Crafted from Stainless Steel, the 4 litre capacity of our Ice Bucket offers ample room for a bottle of your favourite bubbly. Perfect for bars, weddings and functions, our lightweight metal Tongs and Scoops offer an efficient and hygienic means of handling ice, sweets and other foodstuffs. Bring some sophistication and class to your cocktail party with our Glass Straws and Swizzle Sticks - stylish accessories that will enhance your drinking experience while also reducing waste. Ideal for those looking to inject some retro vibes into their kitchen, our Striped Drinking Straws come complete with a classic red and white striped design reminiscent of classic 1950's American diners, while the extra thick plastic means you'll be able to wash and reuse again and again.
